creator: ports@christianserving.org
text: The clang bump is indeed the issue. Once I fixed the first error that you found (it has been fixed upstream by Tokutek), that led to another and another and another. I am about 4 or 5 deep right now. I'm not sure if correcting all of these as one-offs is the answer, or if the port should just build with GCC (which I also hate to do). :-(
